notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.15.0 New Tool: Dither Analysis under Star Stuff. Load and analyze your raw images to verify your acquisition is dithering properly and what you are expecting. Can run Dither Analysis after Stacking now as well. Updated SyQon Starless in prep of AxiomV2.1. Other tools updated: Blink, Continuum Subtraction, Star Alignment, Stacking Suite, and Satellite Removal.
